series_metadata.series_description: These manuals are created for the Districts to follow policies and procedures for state testing: Directions for Administration; District Test Coordinator; Building Test Coordinator Manuals; Supplemental Instructions for Paper Testing; and Test Administration Manuals. These manuals are updated annually for every Fall, Spring and optional summer testing for each school year.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain five years, then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain five years, then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
